---
title: "Project Updates"
description-meta: "News and progress updates from the MMLoS project"
date-modified: "2026-02-22"
---

# Project Updates

## February 2026 — Project Kick-off

- **Start date:** 1 April 2026 confirmed
- **Team recruitment:** underway for Research Assistant, Research Software Engineer, and Research Fellow positions at University of Westminster
- **Steering Group formation:** invitations sent to local authority partners and ATE representatives
- **Literature review:** completed and published as a Quarto document — see the [Research](/research.qmd) page

## Upcoming Milestones

- **Apr–May 2026:** Confirm case-study locations; initial design advisory group meeting
- **Jun 2026:** Data collection plan finalised; baseline datasets acquired
- **Jul 2026:** Methodology white paper draft; first prototype scoring function

## Older Updates

_This section will be populated as the project progresses._
 
---

*For historical updates, see the [`multilevelos/bid` repository](https://github.com/multilevelos/bid) for the original proposal documentation.*
